title: Analyzing Customer Feedback
scenario: A customer support team needs to analyze customer feedback on a new product. The feedback includes both positive and negative comments. The team wants to identify patterns and trends in the feedback and make recommendations for improvement.
constraints: Must include a clear summary of the feedback
Must identify at least 3 patterns or trends in the feedback

evaluationCriteria.description: The summary of the feedback is accurate and comprehensive.
The team identifies at least 3 patterns or trends in the feedback.
The recommendations for improvement are well-reasoned and feasible.
